outputs.description: ID of the IoC. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.affected_domain Affected domain of the IoC.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._id

outputs.description: The array contains the underlying type of the credentials object, in this case ["credential-sighting"]. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.body.raw This is the raw content captured from the breach Flashpoint discovered.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.basetypes

outputs.description: This is the breach header object. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.basetypes Array containing underlying base type of breach object, i.e. ["breach"].
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach._header

outputs.description: Constant for future use. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.created_at.date-time Date
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.breach_type

outputs.description: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.created_at.timestamp UNIX timestamp. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.first_observed_at.date-time
outputs.name: Datetime object formatted as YYYY-mm-ddTHH:MM:SSZ.

outputs.description: Datetime object formatted as YYYY-mm-ddTHH:MM:SSZ. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.first_observed_at.timestamp UNIX timestamp.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Flashpoint ID of the breach. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.source Data source of breach (i.e. Analyst Research, CredentialStealer, etc.).
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.fpid

outputs.description: Type of source of the breach. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.title Title of breach.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.source_type

outputs.description: Victim of the breach. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.credential_record_fpid This is the Flashpoint ID of the associated record object. This is used to retrieve sightings for a credential.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.breach.victim

outputs.description: Customer ID of the IoC. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.domain This is the domain object extracted off of the email address.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.customer_id

outputs.description: The email address for the compromised credential. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.extraction_id Extraction ID of the IoC.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.email

outputs.description: Extraction record ID of the IoC. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.fpid The Flashpoint ID of this credentials object.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.extraction_record_id

outputs.description: source.header .indexed_at Timestamp for when this document was indexed into the Flashpoint database.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential.

outputs.description: source.header .pipeline_duration Pipeline duration header information of the IoC.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential.

outputs.description: This will be "true" if the credential has not been seen before, and it hasn't been marked "not fresh" by an analyst. (Historical breaches are not "fresh".). Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.last_observed_at.date-time Date
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.is_fresh

outputs.description: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.last_observed_at.timestamp UNIX timestamp. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password
outputs.name: If exists, time object for when the credential was previously observed. Datetime object formatted as YYYY-mm-ddTHH:MM:SSZ.

outputs.description: The password for the credential (in plain text, if possible). Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.has_lowercase Boolean true/false if lowercase letters are present.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Boolean true/false if numbers are present. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.has_symbol Boolean true/false if symbols are present.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.has_number

outputs.description: Boolean true/false if uppercase letters are present. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.length Integer value that represents number of characters in password.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.has_uppercase

outputs.description: List of possible hash algorithms suspected based on textpattern of the password (May include values like "MD5", "SHA-1", "SHA-256", "bcrypt", etc.) Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.times_seen Integer representing the number of times the credential has been seen at Flashpoint.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._source.password_complexity.probable_hash_algorithms

outputs.description: Type of the IoC. Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential.matched_queries Matching queries of the IoC.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential._type

outputs.description: Sort value of the IoC.
outputs.name: Flashpoint.CompromisedCredential.sort
